item.title: About
item.description: Hi! I’m Emil, welcome to my website. Here you will find posts related to my work and interests. I have recently joined the High Energy Physics group at UCL as a PhD student, under the supervision of Andreas Korn. My work will involve searching for signatures of exotic, long-lived particles, as a member of the ATLAS experiment at the LHC. Before joining UCL, I completed a master’s degree in physics at the University of Bristol.
